tasks.title: Bot skeleton: config, SQLite schema, update router, conversation state, /start registration with roles, /help, fallbacks (details.md §1, §12, §13)

Wire all flows end-to-end, timezone/restart safety pass, error fallbacks everywhere (details.md §13, design.md §5)
